products.title: Products
drafts.title: Listing wizard drafts
drafts.description: In-progress wizards that haven't been submitted yet. Click any row to resume where you left off. Wizards expire after 30 days of inactivity.
drafts.emptyHint: Wizards started from /products/:id/list-wizard appear here until submitted, alongside any standalone Product DRAFTs.
drafts.searchPlaceholder: Search by SKU or product name…
drafts.sort.name: Name A–Z
organize.title: Catalog Organization
organize.description: Promote standalones to parents, attach orphans to existing parents, and approve auto-detected variation groups. Multi-channel awareness throughout.
analytics.title: Outbound analytics
analytics.description: Cycle time, cost, late rate, and carrier performance across the selected window.
analytics.empty: No data in this window yet.
analytics.trend.title: Daily ship trend
analytics.trend.subtitle: Last {n} days
analytics.slaByChannel.title: SLA by channel
analytics.slaByMarketplace.title: SLA by marketplace
analytics.slaByMarketplace.subtitle: Splits each channel by marketplace — Amazon-IT vs Amazon-DE diverge on Prime SLA.
analytics.insights.title: Insights
analytics.insights.subtitle: Cost + reliability recommendations from current data
pack.weightCheck.ok: Weight matches expected ({declared} kg vs {expected} kg, {pct}% variance)
pack.weightCheck.warning: Off by {pct}% — declared {declared} kg vs expected {expected} kg
pack.weightCheck.error: Mismatch {pct}% — declared {declared} kg vs expected {expected} kg, recheck items or scale
pack.split.hint: Enter how many units of each line to move into a new sibling shipment. Use this when items don't fit one box.
pack.split.willCreate: Creates a new shipment for the same order
rates.title: Compare rates
rates.empty: No rates available. Set the shipment's destination + weight first.
savedViews.label: Views
outbound.alerts.subscribe: Subscribe — get notified when this view's count exceeds a threshold
outbound.alerts.unsubscribe: Active alert at threshold {threshold} — click to remove
outbound.alerts.editTooltip: Active alert at threshold {threshold} — click to edit or remove
outbound.alerts.editPrompt: New threshold (current: {threshold}) — leave empty to remove the alert:
outbound.alerts.prompt: Notify me when count goes above:
outbound.alerts.invalidThreshold: Invalid threshold — enter a non-negative number
outbound.alerts.created: Alert created — you'll be notified when the threshold trips
outbound.alerts.empty: No alerts on this view yet — add one below.
outbound.title: Outbound
outbound.description: Pick, pack, and ship orders across all channels. Pending = needs a shipment created. Shipments = mid-flight or done.
outbound.pending.empty.title: No pending shipments
outbound.pending.empty.allCaughtUp: All caught up — every paid order has a shipment in flight.
outbound.pending.empty.filtered: No orders match your filters. Try clearing them.
outbound.onboarding.title: Welcome to outbound shipping
outbound.onboarding.body: Connect a carrier to start printing labels. You can also pre-set carrier and warehouse rules so new orders route automatically.
outbound.shipments.hold.prompt: Why is this shipment being held?
outbound.shipments.release.toast: Hold released — shipment back to draft
outbound.shipments.sendcloudNotConnected: Label printing and tracking sync need a Sendcloud connection.
outbound.shipments.empty.title: No shipments here
outbound.shipments.empty.description: Shipments get created from the Pending tab, or via bulk-create from the orders page.
outbound.shipments.action.label: Label
outbound.shipments.void.title: Void this label?
outbound.shipments.void.description: Cancels the Sendcloud parcel and resets the shipment to PACKED so you can re-rate or re-print. Refused if the carrier has already picked it up.
outbound.drawer.noShipmentYet: No shipment yet. Click Create shipment below to start.
outbound.drawer.customs.title: Customs preflight
outbound.drawer.weight.pendingPack: Weight check runs after pack station weighs the parcel.
outbound.drawer.weight.masterMissing: One or more SKUs lack a master weight — fix to enable the weight check.
outbound.drawer.weight.ok: Weight matches: {declared} kg vs expected {expected} kg ({pct}% variance)
outbound.drawer.weight.warning: Weight off by {pct}%: {declared} kg vs expected {expected} kg
outbound.drawer.weight.error: Weight mismatch {pct}%: {declared} kg vs expected {expected} kg — re-weigh or recheck items
outbound.shipments.copy.title: Copy tracking number
outbound.drawer.customs.fixProduct: Open product to add the missing HS code or origin
outbound.drawer.copyAddress.title: Copy shipping address
outbound.drawer.copyChannelOrderId.title: Copy channel order id
outbound.drawer.activityViewAll: View full audit log for this order
outbound.pending.bulkResults.title: Bulk create — results
outbound.pending.preflight.tooltip: Check master data + customs readiness before bulk create
outbound.pending.preflight.title: Bulk create — preflight
outbound.pending.preflight.allReady: All selected orders are ready to ship.
outbound.pending.preflight.issue.hsMissi: International — one or more SKUs missing HS code
outbound.pending.preflight.issue.originM: International — one or more SKUs missing country of origin
outbound.pending.snooze.wake: Bring this row back to the active list
outbound.pending.snooze.bulkTooltip: Hide all selected rows for 1 hour
outbound.pending.exportCsv.tooltip: Download selected orders as CSV (channel, customer, ship-by, urgency)
outbound.drawer.cancel.title: Cancel this order?
outbound.drawer.cancel.description: Marks the order CANCELLED, voids any unprinted/unshipped Sendcloud parcels, and restocks the items. The marketplace customer is NOT auto-notified — cancel on the channel separately if needed.
outbound.drawer.cancel.toast: Order cancelled — shipments voided + stock restored
outbound.drawer.cancel.channelReminder: Remember to cancel order {orderId} on {channel} too — Nexus does not push the cancellation upstream automatically.
pack.title: Pack station
pack.weightRequired: Weight is required. Dimensions improve carrier rate accuracy.
pack.customs.title: Customs review
pack.customs.hint: Set HS codes on the affected products before printing the label — Sendcloud will reject otherwise.
rules.title: Shipping rules
rules.description: WHEN ⟨conditions⟩ THEN ⟨actions⟩. Walked in priority ASC; first match wins. Applies at shipment creation.
rules.empty.title: No shipping rules yet
rules.empty.description: Without rules, every shipment defaults to SENDCLOUD. Define a rule to override carrier / service per order context.
rules.delete.title: Delete rule?
rules.delete.description: "{name}" will stop firing. This cannot be undone.
rules.modal.subtitle: WHEN conditions match → THEN actions apply
rules.field.name: Name
rules.toast.duplicated: Rule duplicated — disabled until you enable it
rules.simulator.title: Rule simulator
rules.simulator.subtitle: Build a hypothetical order context and see which rule would match.
rules.simulator.noMatch: No rule matched. Walked {n} active rule(s); fallback to SENDCLOUD default.
listings.live.tooltipConnected: Live updates connected. Sync events stream within 200 ms.
listings.live.tooltipDisconnected: Live stream disconnected — falling back to 30 s polling.
listings.matrix.sort.name: Name (A→Z)
listings.matrix.empty.title: No matches
listings.bulk.timeout: Job did not complete in 60 s — still running ({progress}). Check back shortly.
listings.bulk.unpublishConfirm.title: Unpublish {count} listing?
listings.bulk.unpublishConfirm.descripti: These listings will go offline on their marketplaces. You can republish from the success banner within 30 seconds.
listings.savedViews.heading: Saved views
listings.savedViews.useAsDefault: Use as default on page load
listings.savedViews.deleteConfirm.title: Delete view "{name}"?
listings.savedViews.deleteConfirm.descri: This view will be removed permanently.
listings.drawer.combosCount: This product is on {count} channel/marketplace combo. Each card below shows drift vs master.
listings.drawer.combosCountPlural: This product is on {count} channel/marketplace combos. Each card below shows drift vs master.
listings.drawer.empty: No other channel listings for this product yet.
listings.drawer.diffsAnchor: Channel cells in this row diff against these values.
carriers.title: Carriers
carriers.description: Connect shipping providers. Sendcloud aggregates BRT, GLS, Poste, DHL, UPS, FedEx and more in one integration. Amazon Buy Shipping covers FBM-via-Amazon at discounted rates.
carriers.section.connectedNone: No carriers connected yet — start with Sendcloud.
carriers.section.viaSendcloudHint: These carriers ship through your Sendcloud connection. No separate setup.
carriers.disconnect.title: Disconnect {name}?
carriers.disconnect.description: Existing shipments are preserved. New labels will fail until reconnected.
carriers.empty.title: No carriers match
carriers.empty.description: Try a different region filter or clear the search.
carriers.banner.dryRun: Sandbox mode — labels are mocked, no real Sendcloud calls.
carriers.howItWorks.title: How carrier connections work
carriers.howItWorks.b1: Sendcloud is the recommended setup for Italian operations — one integration covers BRT, GLS, Poste, DHL, UPS, FedEx.
carriers.howItWorks.b2: When a shipment is created at /fulfillment/outbound, Nexus calls the configured carrier to print the label and pulls the tracking number.
carriers.howItWorks.b3: Tracking numbers automatically push back to the originating channel (Amazon, eBay, Shopify).
carriers.howItWorks.b4: Amazon Buy Shipping is only needed if you want to fulfill FBM orders directly through Amazon's network at discounted rates.
carriers.cap.label: Labels
carriers.test.dryRun: Sandbox mode (mock — no real Sendcloud call)
stock.title: Stock
stock.description: Multi-location inventory ledger across Riccione, Amazon FBA, and per-channel allocations.
stock.empty.title: No stock matches these filters
stock.empty.descriptionDefault: Stock levels appear once products are imported and seeded.
stock.drawer.title: Stock detail
stock.adjust.errInvalidChange: Enter a non-zero number (positive to add, negative to remove)
stock.transfers.title: Transfers
stock.transfers.description: Inter-location stock transfers. Each row pairs a TRANSFER_OUT with the matching TRANSFER_IN.
stock.transfers.empty.title: No transfers yet
stock.transfers.empty.description: Transfers between Riccione and Amazon FBA (or future locations) appear here once you move stock between them.
stock.reservations.title: Reservations
stock.reservations.description: Stock holds across the lifecycle: open marketplace orders, manual holds, promotion blocks. Active rows show TTL countdown; settled rows show resolution timestamp.
stock.reservations.empty.title: No reservations match this filter
stock.reservations.empty.description: Reservations are created automatically when an order is ingested (S.2 reserve-then-consume), or manually via the per-product drawer.
stock.analytics.title: Analytics
stock.analytics.description: Stock turnover and Days-of-Inventory across the catalog. COGS computed from DailySalesAggregate; inventory value from current StockLevel × cost price.
stock.analytics.byChannel.title: Sales by channel
stock.analytics.empty.title: No sales data in this window
stock.analytics.empty.description: DailySalesAggregate is empty for the selected period. Once orders ingest and the daily aggregator runs, turnover + DoH appear here.
stock.deadStock.title: Dead stock & slow-movers
stock.deadStock.dead.title: Dead — no movement in {days}d
stock.deadStock.dead.empty: No dead stock at this threshold
stock.deadStock.slow.title: Slow — < {v} units/day
stock.deadStock.recommended.title: Recommended actions
stock.deadStock.recommended.body: Markdown to clear margin-positive units · transfer surplus to a faster-moving location · scrap unsellable inventory via a WRITE_OFF stock movement (S.12 reason picker)
cycleCount.list.empty.title: No cycle counts yet
cycleCount.list.empty.description: Create a count session to spot-check or fully audit physical inventory at a warehouse location. Variances apply through StockMovement so the audit trail explains every count-driven adjustment.
cycleCount.list.modal.title: New cycle count
cycleCount.list.modal.locationHelp: Every product with a stock level at this location will be snapshotted.
cycleCount.list.toast.created: Cycle count created — open it to start counting
cycleCount.session.completeConfirmDescri: Make sure every variance has been resolved.
cycleCount.session.qtyInvalid: Counted quantity must be a non-negative integer
cycleCount.session.scanPlaceholder: Aim scanner here or type SKU…
cycleCount.session.scanHelp: Scan or type a SKU to jump to its count input. Camera mode (📷) works on phones.
cycleCount.session.scanRowHidden: Row hidden by current filter — clear the filter to count {sku}
cycleCount.session.reasonModal.cancelDes: The session will move to CANCELLED and stop accepting counts. Already-reconciled adjustments are kept.
cycleCount.session.reasonModal.ignoreDes: The variance is left in the audit trail but is not applied to stock.
cycleCount.session.reasonModal.label: Reason
cycleCount.session.reasonModal.cancelPla: e.g. recount tomorrow with new operator
